name: Jalapeno Cornbread
recipeInstructions:
Preparation Time: 0:15
1. Combine cornmeal, baking soda, and salt in a large bowl.
2. Add the remaining ingredients to the bowl and stir until just combined.
3. Pour the batter into a greased 10-inch cast-iron skillet.
4. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 45 minutes or until golden brown.
5. Yield: 10 servings
